question: Q3
title: citeCorrect metric is binary; 3-tier-aware fix
summary: extract-metrics.mjs:65-66 uses citeExpected = (good?cite_results:do_not_cite) + exact equality, so every cite_with_caveat cell scores wrong. Fix: valid-set membership VALID_CITE={good:[cite_results],weak:[cite_with_caveat,do_not_cite_results],gap:[do_not_cite_results]}. Localized to the benchmark script.
